function.name: explore
function.description: Autonomously explore the codebase to answer questions about architecture, implementation, and code flow. READ-ONLY exploration - no files will be modified. The agent will use bash, read, search, web_search, and fetch tools to thoroughly investigate the codebase and provide findings. Use this for questions like 'how does authentication work?', 'where is user management implemented?', 'what files handle routing?'

query.description: The exploration question or goal (e.g., 'how does user authentication work in this codebase?')

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of exploration iterations (default: 10, max: 15). Higher values allow more thorough exploration but use more tokens.
